board.title: Board
board.description: A container for tasks, representing a project or category.

description.description: Optional description of the board's purpose.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this board.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the board was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the board.

task.title: Task
task.description: A specific action item belonging to a board.

description.description: A detailed description of the task.

status.description: The current state of the task.

ownerId.description: The user UID who created the task.

tags.description: A bounded set of tags for categorization.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the task was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the task.

/boards/{boardId}.description: Stores organizational boards created by authenticated users.

/boards/{boardId}/tasks/{taskId}.description: Stores individual tasks housed inside a specific board container.
